source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two infinite strips of width \( w \) m in x-direction as shown in the figure are carrying forward and return currents of \( +I \) and \( -I \) in the z-direction. The strips are separated by a distance of \( x \) m. The inductance per unit length of the configuration is measured to be \( L \) H/m. If the distance of separation between the strips is now reduced to \( x/2 \) m, the inductance per unit length of the configuration is
